summary: End-to-end research workflow completed successfully. The system discovered papers, extracted structured findings, synthesized insights, critiqued weak evidence, and generated an actionable implementation plan.

implementation_plan.project_idea: Build a local-first research copilot that turns paper discovery, reading, critique, and planning into a single workflow. Initial application focus: research session listing: A Survey of Modern Methods: A high-level survey covering key themes, benchmarks, and open problems related to the query.
implementation_plan.value_proposition: The system helps users move from scattered papers to structured action faster by focusing on themes like high-level survey.

architecture.summary: Build a local-first research copilot that turns paper discovery, reading, critique, and planning into a single workflow. Initial application focus: research session listing: A Survey of Modern Methods: A high-level survey covering key themes, benchmarks, and open problems related to the query.
components: FastAPI backend for orchestration and agent workflows
Next.js frontend for query input, progress views, and reports
Research agent pipeline using arXiv and Semantic Scholar
Reader, analyst, critic, and builder agents for structured synthesis
Optional Ollama integration for local model enhancement
Local storage layer for sessions, cached papers, and reports
data_flow: User submits a research query through the frontend
Discovery services retrieve and rank candidate papers
Reader extracts structured findings from paper text
Analyst synthesizes themes, gaps, conflicts, and applications
Critic highlights risks and weak evidence
Builder converts the research state into an actionable project plan

collection_strategy: Fetch metadata from public research APIs during discovery
Cache normalized paper text and extracted summaries locally
Allow users to upload or paste paper content for deeper analysis
privacy_considerations: Keep user research sessions stored locally by default
Avoid sending private paper content to remote services unless explicitly enabled
Separate optional Ollama usage from external API dependencies

mvp_roadmap.name: Phase 1
goals: Finalize the backend research pipeline from discovery to builder output
Store session results locally for repeatable experiments
Expose clean API endpoints for multi-step research workflows

mvp_roadmap.name: Phase 2
goals: Build a frontend for query submission, paper browsing, and report views
Improve structured document ingestion for PDFs and uploaded notes

mvp_roadmap.name: Phase 3
goals: Add optional Ollama-powered enhancement to synthesis and critique
Strengthen export, memory, and long-running workflow support
Prepare the architecture for future deployment or collaboration features
